raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_intent","object_kind":"future_action","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I'll contact the local tourism board to get more information about the International Market and the Holiday Market.","distilled_fact":"The speaker intends to contact the local tourism board to get more information about the International Market and the Holiday Market."},{"signal_kind":"potential_intent","object_kind":"future_action","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"I've been meaning to reach out to Rachel, the jewelry maker I met at the Craft Fair, to collaborate on a future project.","distilled_fact":"The speaker intends to reach out to Rachel, the jewelry maker the speaker met at the Craft Fair, to collaborate on a future project."},{"signal_kind":"potential_intent","object_kind":"future_action","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"Do you think I could also ask the tourism board if they know of any upcoming craft fairs or artisan markets in the area?","distilled_fact":"The speaker intends to ask the local tourism board if it knows of any upcoming craft fairs or artisan markets in the area."}]}
